caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is recording in a studio, wearing black headphones and a dark grey shirt. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm, with a grey acoustic foam wall in the background. An inset window on the right side of the screen displays a white pickup truck parked on a dirt surface under a cloudy sky. Throughout the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift; he begins by looking slightly upward and to the side, then transitions into a wide smile with his teeth showing, before settling into a neutral expression while speaking into the microphone. The background and the inset image of the truck remain static as the man's head and facial expressions move slightly across the frames.
